messages.message: Unexpected nullable string value in conditional. Please handle the nullish/empty cases explicitly.

suggestions.desc: Change condition to check for null/undefined (`value != null`)
Explicitly treat nullish value the same as an empty string (`value ?? ""`)
Explicitly convert value to a boolean (`Boolean(value)`)

fix.text:
([
                      Array.isArray(shippingGroup.autoAssignCategoryIds) &&
                      shippingGroup.autoAssignCategoryIds.length > 0
                        ? `Categories (${shippingGroup.autoAssignCategoryIds.length}): ${
                            shippingGroupNormalizedRuleSummaryById.get(shippingGroup.id) ??
                            `${shippingGroup.autoAssignCategoryIds.length} categories`
                          }`
                        : null,
                      Array.isArray(shippingGroup.autoAssignCategoryIds) &&
                      shippingGroup.autoAssignCategoryIds.length > 0
                        ? `Auto: ${
                            shippingGroupNormalizedRuleSummaryById.get(shippingGroup.id) ??
                            `${shippingGroup.autoAssignCategoryIds.length} categories`
                          }${
                            (shippingGroupRuleCoverageById.get(shippingGroup.id)?.descendantIds
                              .length ?? 0) > 0
                              ? ' (+ descendants)'
                              : ''
                          }`
                        : null,
                      shippingGroup.traderaShippingCondition ||
                      typeof shippingGroup.traderaShippingPriceEur === 'number'
                        ? `Tradera: ${
                            shippingGroup.traderaShippingCondition || 'Shipping modal'
                          }${
                            typeof shippingGroup.traderaShippingPriceEur === 'number'
                              ? ` · EUR ${shippingGroup.traderaShippingPriceEur.toFixed(2)}`
                              : ''
                          }`
                        : null,
                      shippingGroupRedundantRuleSummaryById.get(shippingGroup.id)
                        ? `Redundant: ${shippingGroupRedundantRuleSummaryById.get(shippingGroup.id)}`
                        : null,
                      shippingGroupMissingRuleSummaryById.get(shippingGroup.id)
                        ? `Missing: ${shippingGroupMissingRuleSummaryById.get(shippingGroup.id)}`
                        : null,
                    ]
                      .filter((value): value is string => Boolean(value))
                      .join(' · ').length > 0)

suggestions.desc: Change condition to check string's length (`value.length !== 0`)

fix.text:
([
                      Array.isArray(shippingGroup.autoAssignCategoryIds) &&
                      shippingGroup.autoAssignCategoryIds.length > 0
                        ? `Categories (${shippingGroup.autoAssignCategoryIds.length}): ${
                            shippingGroupNormalizedRuleSummaryById.get(shippingGroup.id) ??
                            `${shippingGroup.autoAssignCategoryIds.length} categories`
                          }`
                        : null,
                      Array.isArray(shippingGroup.autoAssignCategoryIds) &&
                      shippingGroup.autoAssignCategoryIds.length > 0
                        ? `Auto: ${
                            shippingGroupNormalizedRuleSummaryById.get(shippingGroup.id) ??
                            `${shippingGroup.autoAssignCategoryIds.length} categories`
                          }${
                            (shippingGroupRuleCoverageById.get(shippingGroup.id)?.descendantIds
                              .length ?? 0) > 0
                              ? ' (+ descendants)'
                              : ''
                          }`
                        : null,
                      shippingGroup.traderaShippingCondition ||
                      typeof shippingGroup.traderaShippingPriceEur === 'number'
                        ? `Tradera: ${
                            shippingGroup.traderaShippingCondition || 'Shipping modal'
                          }${
                            typeof shippingGroup.traderaShippingPriceEur === 'number'
                              ? ` · EUR ${shippingGroup.traderaShippingPriceEur.toFixed(2)}`
                              : ''
                          }`
                        : null,
                      shippingGroupRedundantRuleSummaryById.get(shippingGroup.id)
                        ? `Redundant: ${shippingGroupRedundantRuleSummaryById.get(shippingGroup.id)}`
                        : null,
                      shippingGroupMissingRuleSummaryById.get(shippingGroup.id)
                        ? `Missing: ${shippingGroupMissingRuleSummaryById.get(shippingGroup.id)}`
                        : null,
                    ]
                      .filter((value): value is string => Boolean(value))
                      .join(' · ') !== "")

messages.message: Function 'ShippingGroupsStateProvider' has too many lines (330). Maximum allowed is 60.
Missing return type on function.
Function 'ShippingGroupsStateProvider' has a complexity of 9. Maximum allowed is 8.
Unexpected string value in conditional. An explicit empty string check is required.

suggestions.desc: Change condition to check string's length (`value.length !== 0`)
Change condition to check for empty string (`value !== ""`)
Explicitly convert value to a boolean (`Boolean(value)`)

messages.message: Unexpected string value in conditional. An explicit empty string check is required.

suggestions.desc: Change condition to check string's length (`value.length !== 0`)
Change condition to check for empty string (`value !== ""`)
Explicitly convert value to a boolean (`Boolean(value)`)

messages.message: Unexpected nullable string value in conditional. Please handle the nullish/empty cases explicitly.

suggestions.desc: Change condition to check for null/undefined (`value != null`)
Explicitly treat nullish value the same as an empty string (`value ?? ""`)
Explicitly convert value to a boolean (`Boolean(value)`)

messages.message: Function 'useValidatorSettingsController' has too many lines (573). Maximum allowed is 60.
Missing return type on function.
Function 'useValidatorSettingsController' has a complexity of 15. Maximum allowed is 8.
Arrow function has a complexity of 15. Maximum allowed is 8.
Forbidden non-null assertion.
Variable name `_ignoredHandleReorderInGroup` must match one of the following formats: camelCase, UPPER_CASE, PascalCase
Unnecessary conditional, value is always truthy.
Unexpected string value in conditional. An explicit empty string check is required.

suggestions.desc: Change condition to check string's length (`value.length !== 0`)
Change condition to check for empty string (`value !== ""`)
Explicitly convert value to a boolean (`Boolean(value)`)

Unnecessary conditional, expected left-hand side of `??` operator to be possibly null or undefined.

Unexpected nullable string value in conditional. Please handle the nullish/empty cases explicitly.

Explicitly convert value to a boolean (`Boolean(value)`)
